statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Task Scheduler start page
links.summary: Microsoft documents Task Scheduler as the Windows control surface for scheduled tasks.

links.title: Local Windows task file observation
links.summary: The listed task paths were checked on the current Windows host. MareBackup, Consolidator, UsbCeip, SilentCleanup, DmClient, and QueueReporting were present; Microsoft Compatibility Appraiser was absent on this machine, confirming version-dependent task presence.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider disables the listed task paths through the batch scheduled-task tweak.

links.title: Repo notes for the scheduled-tasks bundle
links.summary: The repo documents the current scheduled-task bundle and notes that users should read through the list before switching it.
